programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: While trying to get home from a snowy area north of their crater, the gang meets a lonely but helpful Trux named Snowblazer who helps them navigate.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

Will Rupert and Ping Pong be able to stop Raggety in time before the shoes carry him one step too far, into danger?

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert is on a hunt for leaves to fill his new wall chart. He meets Raggety who offers to help him find a strange star-shaped leaf from a magical tree – the oldest tree in Nutwood. The Fox Twins don't think much of leaf hunting. They overhear Rupert's plans and decide to play a trick on Rupert and Raggety. But their trick backfires when Raggety does some elf magic and Freddie vanishes into thin air. How will Rupert and Raggety find Freddie and get him back to Freda? And what of their search for the oldest tree in the forest?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he’s cut out to be a paramedic--until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In order to stop Moray's plan of directing a lava flow through Mexico City, the team must navigate through the underground tunnels and find his secret lair. But first they have to get their cars back from the DMV! Once they accomplish that, they learn that tunnels are much more complicated than they appear and Tony makes the ultimate sacrifice in order to help them stop Moray in time.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Palindrome has been captured, Tony is gone, and Moray has activated his lava machine. The team starts to accept defeat, until… Tony reveals that he’s still alive! The team rallies behind this good news and launches one last attack to defeat Moray once and for all and stop the lava heading for the streets of Mexico City.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: With Ms. Nowhere and Palindrome off on a mission, the kids occupy their time playing the newest video game craze: Monster Manglers. But Tony isn’t being a team player, which leads him solo into a mysterious race against an AI car. Is someone using this game as a trap for the Spy Racers?

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim tries to impress Claire's parents when invited over for BBQ, but when his Amulet goes haywire, Jim must contend with his own worst enemy – himself

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: While trying to get home from a snowy area north of their crater, the gang meets a lonely but helpful Trux named Snowblazer who helps them navigate.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Bully For You When Casper decides he can't take any more of Thatch's nastiness, he forms a secret squad dedicated to putting an end to bullying. The Ra-minator Using the power of invisibility, Casper offers to help transform Ra from a sports zero to an athletic hero.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Weekend at Bunny's Alder and Dash sound the alarm after a terrifying creature threatens Scare School. Grimly Day It's Grimly Day?the grimmest day of the year!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Raggety wants new shoes but can't afford them so Ping Pong tries to jazz up the ones he's wearing but her spell goes wrong and the shoes dance off with Raggety inside them and unable to stop. Will Rupert and Ping Pong be able to stop Raggety in time before the shoes carry him one step too far, into danger?

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert is on a hunt for leaves to fill his new wall chart. He meets Raggety who offers to help him find a strange star-shaped leaf from a magical tree – the oldest tree in Nutwood. The Fox Twins don't think much of leaf hunting. They overhear Rupert's plans and decide to play a trick on Rupert and Raggety. But their trick backfires when Raggety does some elf magic and Freddie vanishes into thin air. How will Rupert and Raggety find Freddie and get him back to Freda? And what of their search for the oldest tree in the forest?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it’s better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. But when the animals go wild in the snow, Melman’s future-paramedic skills are put to the test during an outbreak of stubbed toes and boo-boos. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he’s cut out to be a paramedic--until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Peabody gets carried away trying to create the perfect band using historical friends, Sherman must stop him from becoming a music monster

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: After hearing a prediction that the world will end during the show, Sherman panics and Peabody must take control of the apocalypse situation

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Eugene’s bond with Webmaster is put to the test when Webmaster leaves the group for a pack of Deathgrippers.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom sets out to prove Sledkin caused an explosion that injured a dragon in the Hidden World.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien tries to get rid of his parents, but when evil Karl traps them in the Love Gauntlet they must prove their family's strength to survive.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After making a bet against Uncle King Julien, King Julien must win the "Jungle Games" in order to maintain control of the royal crown.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Eruptodon can't take its egg into the Great Volcano, Hiccup and Fishlegs must go into the dangerous volcano with the egg before it's too late.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug overhears Thunk accidentally call Phil "Dad", he tries to reconnect with Thunk by taking him to the natural spectacle known as "Big Shine."

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil invents a simple new game called ball-in-cup, everyone except Hope, can't stop playing it. But just when Hope thinks she's rid the farm of the game, she finds herself addicted to the game worst of all.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug thinks his forehead looks too big in Ugga's family portrait, she strives to make the painting disappear.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss accidentally sells Tim's favorite Football Mike toy at a family yard sale, he shirks his duties as a CEO to try to get it back. But the villains pick up on his one weakness, his brother, and so begins a game of elaborate keep-away.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The combined villains have taken over Baby Corp HQ, and a disastrous chupie teleportation accident has all the office babies scattered to the wind. Boss has to regain his leadership gusto to convince Baby Corp to regroup, as Tim and Danny share an emotional last day together before Danny leaves town for good.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With the Baby Corp babies exiled from their office and hiding in the Templeton basement, Boss and a trusted team storm Baby Corp to take it back from the villains. Having decided to retire and pass the CEO-ship onto to Staci, he also prepares Tim for her new life as an older brother to just a normal baby brother.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The Sky Torcher & Flame Throwers invade the Crystal Realm. Tom must conquer his demons and bond with the Fault Ripper to defeat the Sky Torcher.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders discover the Ice Realm and find Buzzsaw inside.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Alex and Eugene find themselves at odds with Tom and their fellow dragon riders when Feathers and Webmaster go missing during a blizzard in the Ice Realm.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Ring of Fire Part 1
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring of Fire Part 2
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: The Man With the Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family’s estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: The Man With the Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben’s gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: With growing interest in nature-friendly interiors, today's homes are all about nature-friendly elements. We’ll introduce you to the "Smart House in Nature" and the extraordinary "Eco-Friendly Open House".

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: Gabbi's longtime friend, Kimberly Stark, is selling her home. But the morning after the very first open house, her broker, Joe Parillo, is found dead in her foyer. Naturally, Kim turns to Gabbi for help.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team partner with brother-sister newbie flippers Blake and Abby on a risky zombie house project. James funds the renovation, while the siblings manage the contractors and oversee the work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets. Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis, but it has recently become too painful.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The Mystery Box is back and it’s every chef for themselves. Without the protection of their regional teams, the chefs must individually face the challenge of preparing a gourmet meal out of army rations.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: This twisted saga, one that has entranced and disturbed the public for years, continues to captivate with its true tale of privilege, madness, and murder.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: Gabbi's longtime friend, Kimberly Stark, is selling her home. But the morning after the very first open house, her broker, Joe Parillo, is found dead in her foyer. Naturally, Kim turns to Gabbi for help.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to make an impossibly delicious brunch menu of parm frittata with tomato sauce, served with a side of sausage and a simple salad that you can eat all day.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: This classic childhood combo gets an adult makeover that will make your mouth water. Rachael shows us her version of creamy tomato soup and a spicy grilled cheese.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Steamed Mud Crab With Glutinous Rice is a classic dish served in high-end Taiwanese restaurants. Chef Wu from A-Sha Restaurant, demonstrates the A-Sha version that has kept gourmets coming for 60 years.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey take on a house that was abandoned by previous flippers! Left with holes in the roof, termite damage and a dilapidated porch this house pushes their skills, and budget, to the limit.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Don't feed the animals at these dining establishments, unless they're your dinner companions. Michael joins some furry and ferocious friends for supper on the ocean floor with the sea life of the Maldives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Allie is a free spirit whose polyamorous lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye. Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family with his wife.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Steamed Mud Crab With Glutinous Rice is a classic dish served in high-end Taiwanese restaurants. Chef Wu from A-Sha Restaurant, demonstrates the A-Sha version that has kept gourmets coming for 60 years.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: Gabbi's longtime friend, Kimberly Stark, is selling her home. But the morning after the very first open house, her broker, Joe Parillo, is found dead in her foyer. Naturally, Kim turns to Gabbi for help.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn’t available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy café.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Inspired by an emotional video documenting their MasterChef journeys, the contestants must bring a dish that best represents who they are now as they come back to win.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes

programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: Focusing on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Hosted by Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks to chief executives and other industry leaders about what drives them and how they navigate and shape their companies amid significant change.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks to chief executives and other industry leaders about what drives them and how they navigate and shape their companies amid significant change.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This program visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history. Today: Tsukemono: Japan's Pickled Soul Food.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Japanese research shows that losing three percent of body weight in three months can reduce disease risk. Learn weight loss tips from a doctor who has helped over 3,000 people at her obesity clinic.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We visit a factory in Kobe that has overcome multiple challenges to keep making tasty "ekiben" railway bento (boxed meals) of local delicacies like the famous "octopus trap" and self-heating sukiyaki.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: A centuries-old eel catching technique. Bridges designed to be submerged in the river. Locals have found ingenious ways to coexist with the Shimanto. See this mighty river in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: The Funky Girls are a women's tug-of-war team with an average age of 50. Three nights a week, they forget all their personal problems and practice in pursuit of a shared dream--champions of Japan.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Summer #6
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to root. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: 25 My throat hurts. / To explain a part of your body that ails you, say the part, then the particle "ga," followed by adjectives like "itai," meaning painful, and finally "n desu."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: More and more foreign students come to Japan to become certified auto mechanics and find long-term employment. We follow one such student, a young woman from Myanmar who pursues her Japanese dream.

programme.title: Hello!NHK World Japan
programme.desc: At the University of Tokyo's Study Abroad Fair, NHK WORLD-JAPAN showed students how its content can be used to learn practical English, and introduced an educational program in Japanese schools.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: In the choir division of a major gospel event, held in New York in May 2025, TiA led a group of 86 Japanese singers to victory. She tells us about the significance of gospel music.

programme.title: A Different Kind of Fish
programme.desc: Sweet-bean-paste-filled taiyaki in the auspicious shape of a seabream or Tai. The Japanese have loved these sweet treats for over 100 years.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Edo's Rush Hour
programme.desc: Edo was a city of waterways. The Yoroi Ferry transported people across the Nihonbashi River, one of its main commercial arteries. For the captain, it was a high-pressure job requiring skill and guts.

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: In Japan and elsewhere across the world, conventional career choices are changing as people increasingly shift from white-collar work to hands-on jobs. We look at the reasons behind the trend.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your
programme.desc: Massive logistics facilities underpin online retail, but their robust warehouse structures, state-of-the-art seismic isolation systems and other features make them suitable as evacuation sites too.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The key to global warming may lie underground: soil contains far more carbon than the atmosphere, but overdevelopment of farmland releases it as CO2. We explore efforts to capture carbon in the soil.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Tanaka Isson had a unique gift for portraying Amami Oshima's nature in art. A child prodigy, his career faltered until he moved to the island. Time-lapse footage hints at scenes that inspired him.

programme.title: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Firefighter Gordon Brewer, is done putting out fires and ready to start one of his own. When his wife and child are horrifically killed in an international terrorist bombing -- linked to Claudio "The Wolf" Perrini -- the CIA and FBI offer no answers and no response. With the official investigation going nowhere, and haunted by the thought of his family's killer walking away scot-free, Gordon swears revenge, even if it takes him to Colombia.

programme.title: Barry Lyndon
programme.desc: Forced to leave Ireland after killing an English officer in a duel, handsome young Redmond Barry (O'Neal) seeks his fortune as a soldier in Prussia, as a spy then as a gambler living among the elite of Europe. He changes his name and marries an aristocrat (Berenson) for her wealth, but the acceptance he seeks finally eludes him.

programme.title: ER S2 17
programme.desc: Resentment grows between Ross and Benton when Benton exposes one of Ross' major medical mistakes. Chloe claims that she's sober, but Lewis keeps her away from Susie.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4 4
programme.desc: Things get hairy for the hunters as some ring in the money while others go for broke. Desert Dan returns to turn up the heat as T Money continues to march to the beat of his own drum. In a quest to protect their territory, Brandon and Lori go to battle for a bin that could prove to be their most profitable yet.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4 5
programme.desc: T Money puts his honesty to the test with shocking revelations. Jesse finds a loser bin that could make him a winner. Brandon and Lori think they see treasure in an unlikely place. And the new kids in town are determined to throw everyone off their game.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 1
programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 2
programme.desc: Watch semi-trucks wreak havoc on roadways, criminals flee cops in pursuit, and crashes, collisions and cars flying through the air -- a dashboard camera can capture it all.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome S1 1
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life compete for glory and $25,000 cash in an arena unlike any other.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 23
programme.desc: Determined to prove that he's just as "black" as his cousin, Carlton accepts Will's challenge to survive for two days in a very tough Los Angeles neighborhood.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 06
programme.desc: A miraculous liquid gives Michael the Midas touch in an eyeglass store. And later, Michael trains the new girl at a tanning salon, but things take a horrifying turn when she believes she's killed her first customer.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 07
programme.desc: Take The Mirror - Michael's candy shop customers witness a live scorpion get freed from a lollipop, and later, Michael's cocktail invention has one man drunk with envy! And in the big finish, a cursed mirror turns simple reflections into reality.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome S1 2
programme.desc: Contestants compete for a shot at $25,000 as they brave the world's most unforgiving battleground.

programme.title: Smallville S1 7
programme.desc: Clark must save Pete from being literally devoured by a female classmate, Jodi Melville, whose diet of Kryptonite-affected vegetables causes her to shed weight faster than she can handle.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4 6
programme.desc: In a day filled with explosive surprises, Team Brandori looks for a big win as the Alvarado Brothers take a gamble and let the pros get under their skin. A fiery contraption has T Money wondering if he scored big or will go down in flames.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4 7
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go for the gold - but find something even better. Jesse takes a swing at Team Brandori, while T- Money does some dangerous bidding of his own. But when the dust settles, will Scott and Chrissy drive away with the golden prize?

programme.desc: Whether a crook on trial takes flight or an inmate gets cozy with a corrections officer, handcuffs and prison walls are no match for rebellious convicts who make last-ditch efforts to break free.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 24
programme.desc: Will and Carlton spy on Ashley when she goes on her "first date" with a famous young rap singer named Little T.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 6
programme.desc: It's spa day for the Jokers, although for them it's anything but relaxing. Then at the park, Sal reveals his secret identity while discussing the "birds-and-bees" of dolphins. Plus, surprised strangers wish they could have their "penny" back for sharing their thoughts. Finally, the big loser finds himself a little over dressed, and at the last minute has the runway pulled out from under him.

programme.title: ER S2 18
programme.desc: Greene copes with an understaffed ER on a night shift; a teen overdoses on a toxic chemical; a drive-by shooting injures a baby.

programme.title: Jersey Boys
programme.desc: From Oscar?winning director Clint Eastwood (Million Dollar Baby, Unforgiven) comes the big-screen adaptation of the Tony Award-winning musical. JERSEY BOYS tells the story of four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the legendary 1960s rock group The Four Seasons. John Lloyd Young reprises his Tony-winning role of legendary lead singer Frankie Valli, alongside Erich Bergen as the group's co-writer Bob Gaudio. The story of their trials and triumphsare accompanied by the songs that influenced a generation, including "Sherry," Big Girls Don't Cry," Walk Like a Man," and many more --classic hits that are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the musical that's been running on Broadway for more than eight years.

programme.title: Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering big questions! He learns how to brush teeth, why we sneeze & how spiders make their webs!

programme.title: Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Blippi makes fun nature discoveries! He learns why islands don't float & how ants walk in a straight line!

programme.title: Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Baby John is growing up! He learns that being little is awesome, shows his feelings & finds his lost pacifier!

programme.title: Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Learn to play soccer with Baby John! Practice your kicks, score a big goal, and see why sharing is caring.

programme.title: Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: Learn healthy habits on the farm! Ella learns to wash her hands, eat veggies & how to recycle!

programme.title: A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a super fun day on the farm! Ella plays "Mummy Duck," learns animal sounds & adopts a cat!

programme.title: A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: It's a fun school day with JJ! He learns the alphabet with blocks & sings about the five senses!

programme.title: The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Get ready for the big game with a fast-paced warm-up! Dance to your favorite songs and get energized to play.

programme.title: Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Go for the gold in a super-powered soccer match where the Magic Pets can use their amazing powers to win!

programme.title: When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Cute creatures are causing big chaos! A sick Magic Pet covers the city in color & the Baby Morphles run wild!

programme.title: Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: It's sci-fi mayhem! Arpo gets stuck in zero gravity mode & accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray!

programme.title: The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's Arpo vs. Squirrel! Arpo battles an army of squirrels & stops the pesky rodent from stealing a pie!

programme.title: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster learns teamwork makes the dream work! He works with his team to win a soccer game & escape a maze!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.title: Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko has creative fixes for funny feelings! He cheers up a sad Fiona & paints a bus to help an anxious Mech!

programme.title: From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Gecko's on epic adventures, from saving Grandma at a waterfall to launching a spaceship to the moon!

programme.title: A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of discovery with Twinkle! She makes music with toadstools & plays "Twinkle Says" with her friends!

programme.title: Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: It's a super creative day of play! Twinkle makes music with toadstools, paints a picture & plays with toys!

programme.title: Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Compete for the Sports Cup with JJ and his animal friends! Race go-karts, build a box car, and never give up.

programme.title: Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Kick off a day of sports with a huge soccer game, then play basketball, baseball, and solve a fun mystery!

programme.title: A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's an underwater sing-along! Sing about five little sharks jumping on the bed & an underwater spider!

programme.title: Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an underwater learning adventure! The Sharksons sing the ABCs, learn colors & brush their shark teeth!

programme.title: When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Everything goes hilariously wrong! Robot gets stuck in jelly & Princess Cat's castle fills with bubbles!

programme.title: Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Feel good & stay safe with KiiYii! They learn how to brush their teeth & how to be safe while riding a bike!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia learns calming yoga poses & Daddy shows her the "brush your teeth dance"!

programme.title: Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Join a perfect playtime party with Mia and friends! Play with a magic ball, jump in a ball pit, and dance!

programme.title: Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: How does JJ like to play? He pretends to be a doctor, plays "Simon Says" & camps with his siblings!

programme.title: Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Race to the finish line with Cody and friends! Compete in a soccer match and a fast-paced sprint to the end.

programme.title: An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: The Minibods go on an adventure! Lulu misses her bunny on a camping trip & Newt learns to ride without pedals!

programme.title: Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn important lessons! Pogo learns to compromise at a party & Newt learns not to give up!

programme.title: So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: So many fun things to discover! The kids play Jack & Jill, have a tea party & make a big puddle splash!

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.title: Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Buster learns to do the right thing! He learns that telling the truth is best & helps save a runaway train!

programme.title: Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Kick off a day of sports with a huge soccer game, then play basketball, baseball, and solve a fun mystery!

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Jennifer moves into a new apartment after leaving her abusive husband. As she starts life anew, something keeps biting her when she sleeps, leading her to be sleep deprived, paranoid and paralyzed with fear of the unseen.

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: FestA Major

programme.title: Anushan

programme.title: LA Nourrice

programme.title: Lakay Nou

programme.title: Lakay Nou

programme.desc: After Danger Force thwarts a robbery at Club Soda and has a legendary night celebrating their win, Ray challenges the kids to repeat their epic night out without their superhero uniforms and powers.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry and Ray try to help Piper carry out a "meet cute" with a new boy she likes from school.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To help Lori out, Luan gets her a job at the Burnt Bean, where Luan is the boss. // Lana struggles to shake off Lily when she starts to follow Lana around like a shadow.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob's parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise. // You'll learn all you need to get your boating license in this educational driving film.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner. // The Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob's parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Squidina hosts a television show to pass a home economics class. // Patrick and SpongeBob try to unlock a dull child's imagination.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick devolves back into a baby so he can keep his childhood toys.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Eager to be named Kings of the Con at the Ace Savvy convention, Lincoln and Clyde convince the sisters to go with them as the Full Deck. // But the girls get more attention, leading the boys to do whatever it takes to gain focus.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse. // When Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luna discovers that the high school music club will be axed due to budget cuts, she leads a protest. // Desperate to play Lincoln's trash-themed video game, Lana conspires to distract her brother away from the console.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other. // After causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him without Mom and Dad knowing.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy seeks Squidward's help to heal her sick tree, but his alternative gardening methods give her a headache.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!"

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana creates an auto-body shop to try and buy a new bike, but her shop turns corrupt when Flip becomes her mentor.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.
